fault_hypothesis: On line 66, the mean is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series has fewer elements than the window, this produces a smaller (incorrect) average.

constraints.intent: mean must equal total divided by the actual number of tail elements, not by window
after computing mean, mean * len(tail) should equal total
before returning mean, it must be the average over actual tail length

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - sum(values[-window:]) / len(values[-window:])) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: returned value must equal the true mean of the tail slice
